title: Learning curve, safety and diagnostic yield of the GalaxyTM, Noah Medical Group robotic bronchoscopy platform.
abstract: Noah Medical Group (Reseda, CA) obtained Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approval for the robotic-assisted bronchoscopy (RAB) Galaxy TM System in 2023. The platform utilizes electromagnetic navigation (EMN) and integrated digital tomosynthesis (DT) for precise nodule targeting. Real-world data on its performance remain limited. This study aimed to evaluate the diagnostic yield and safety of the Galaxy TM system in the first year of its integration in an academic center.
